description: MCP server for managing Apidog test cases, scenarios, suites, and test data

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.acabala/apidog-tests-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Apidog API access token for authentication
environmentVariables.name: APIDOG_ACCESS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Apidog project ID to operate on
environmentVariables.name: APIDOG_PROJECT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Apidog branch ID within the project
environmentVariables.name: APIDOG_BRANCH_ID

environmentVariables.description: Apidog device ID for client identification
environmentVariables.name: APIDOG_DEVICE_ID

environmentVariables.description: Apidog API base URL (defaults to https://api.apidog.com/api/v1)
environmentVariables.name: APIDOG_BASE_URL
